nasb.text: Oh, give ear, Shepherd of Israel, You who lead Joseph like a flock; You who are enthroned above the cherubim, shine forth!

esv.text: Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, you who lead Joseph like a flock. You who are enthroned upon the cherubim, shine forth.

cnv.text: 以色列的牧者啊！帶領約瑟好像帶領羊群的啊！ 求你留心聽； 坐在基路伯上面的啊！ 求你顯出榮光。

csbs.text: 以色列的牧者啊， 引领约瑟如同引领羊群的那一位啊， 求你倾听！ 坐在基路伯之上的那一位啊， 求你发出光芒！
